title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0992
summary: Kushal Rakheja was accused, along with others including his father and co-accused Amrita Sethi, of extorting ₹1.07 crores from complainant Jitender Kawatra by threatening him with false accusations of rape, robbery, and other serious charges. The threats allegedly began after a party in August 20...
